data.title: Vibe Retail Wins the Spring 2026 Top Performer Award in Retail POS Systems from SourceForge
data.description: A company based in Brooklyn, New York known as Vibe Retail has received the SourceForge Spring 2026 Top Performer Award for its CloudPOS system. This accolade positions Vibe Retail among the top 10% of over 100,000 software products that were reviewed for the award.
US CENTCOM: More than 20 vessels remain in Chah Bahar as US forces cut off economic trade going into and coming out of Iran during the ongoing blockade.

data.title: HAMLET HOMES RAISES $45,000 FOR HOMEAID UTAH, GETTING ROUGHLY 45 HOMELESS UTAHN'S OFF THE STREETS PERMANENTLY
data.description: To conclude Season Six of Rock The Block on HGTV, Hamlet organized a 'Block Party' in Salt Lake City, Utah, with thousands of attendees contributing to a fundraiser. The event aimed to combat homelessness in Utah. Meanwhile, Season Seven of the show is underway in Las Vegas, Nevada, currently in its third week.

data.title: Keller Williams Names Christopher Brodhead as Chief Revenue Officer
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Brodhead has been appointed to spearhead the company's revenue growth strategy, further solidifying KW's reputation as the hub for real estate entrepreneurs to excel.
US FDA COMMISSIONER MARTY MAKARY STATES THAT NO DECISION HAS YET BEEN MADE REGARDING THE SUCCESSOR TO DEPARTING CBER DIRECTOR VINAY PRASAD, ADDING THAT A DECISION IS ANTICIPATED IN THE WEEKS AHEAD.

NYMEX Natural Gas May futures settle at $2.5590/MMBTU. Nymex Gasoline May futures settle at $3.5604 a gallon. NYMEX Diesel May futures settle at $3.9712 a gallon. NYMEX WTI crude June futures settle at $99.93 a barrel, up $3.56, 3.69%.
US CRUDE OIL FUTURES CLOSE AT $99.93 PER BARREL, GAINING $3.56 OR 3.69%.

US INTELLIGENCE AGENCIES ARE PROBING HOW TEHRAN WOULD RESPOND IF PRESIDENT DONALD TRUMP UNILATERALLY DECLARED VICTORY IN THE TWO-MONTH-LONG CONFLICT, ACCORDING TO TWO US OFFICIALS AND A SOURCE FAMILIAR WITH THE MATTER.

data.title: FCC reviews ABC's licenses over diversity, amid Trump-Kimmel feud.
data.description: The agency's review was linked to the network's diversity and inclusion protocols, occurring amidst a conflict between the president and the late-night host, Jimmy Kimmel.

data.title: Ningbo's "Eco+" Integration Practice showcased at SCO forum
data.description: From April 28 to April 30, 2026, Ningbo, located in Zhejiang province, China, hosted the Shanghai Cooperation Organization's Green and Sustainable Development Forum. The event highlighted green and low-carbon transition strategies on an international platform. Ningbo presented various concrete examples at the forum to promote sustainable development practices.

data.title: NeuroSense Announces Pricing of Insider-Led PIPE Financing
data.description: NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd., a biotechnology company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, announced on April 28, 2026, that they have secured new financing. The funding round was led by CEO Alon Ben-Noon and CFO Or Eisenberg, with participation from one of their major existing shareholders. NeuroSense, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol NRSN, is currently in the late-clinical stage of drug development.

data.title: Los Tigres del Norte Support St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital In Celebration of El Dia del Niño
data.description: Renowned Latin music group Los Tigres del Norte made their inaugural visit to St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital in Memphis, Tennessee, in support of the Music Gives to St. Jude Kids® program. During their visit, the multi-Grammy Award-winning band explored the hospital's groundbreaking research efforts and engaged with patients and families. They bonded through conversations about music and enjoyed a friendly game of Lotería, a popular Mexican game. Los Tigres del Norte's visit highlighted the importance of supporting initiatives like this, impacting the lives of countless children.

data.title: Hyde Park Capital Advises DevRefactory on its Sale to Capacity
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on April 28, 2026, Hyde Park Capital shared that its customer DevRefactory, a prominent customer experience software provider focusing on omnichannel journey orchestration, embedded middleware, and integrated managed services, has been procured by another entity.

data.title: Anthro Energy Receives U.S. Department of Energy Approval to Advance First U.S.-Owned Advanced Electrolyte Manufacturing Facility into Execution Phase
data.description: A significant achievement is driving the return of crucial battery components to the U.S. and bolstering supply chain resilience. Taking place in ALAMEDA, Calif. on April 28, 2026, Anthro Energy, a cutting-edge battery firm, is making strides in creating advanced polymer electrolytes for lithium-ion batteries. This development marks a key step in enhancing energy storage technology and domestic manufacturing.

data.title: Celebrate Pride Year-Round in Iceland, a Global Leader in LGBTQ+ Travel
data.description: Iceland has established itself as a standout LGBTQ+ friendly destination, known for its prominent Pride festivities, local LGBTQ+ events, and exceptional wedding options. On April 28, 2026, in New York, it was reported that Iceland maintains its position as a worldwide frontrunner in LGBTQ+ acceptance. The country is recognized among the top destinations for LGBTQ+ travelers, offering a welcoming and inclusive environment for all.

data.title: 10ZiG and Nerdio Expand Partnership to Lower TCO and Simplify AVD and Windows 365
data.description: Enhanced partnership improves comprehensive assistance for Azure Virtual Desktop and Windows 365 implementations in PHOENIX on April 28, 2026. 10ZiG® Technology, a top supplier of thin and zero client products for VDI, DaaS, and web applications, unveiled this initiative.

data.title: Virtas and RapidCanvas Announce Strategic Partnership to Transform Financial Consulting into AI-Powered Execution
data.description: A recent collaboration has integrated artificial intelligence (AI) into financial workflows, leading to quicker execution, decreased manual input, and more intelligent decision-making on a large scale. The partnership was unveiled in Austin, Texas on April 28, 2026. Virtas Partners, a consulting company specializing in solutions for the Office of the Chief Financial Officer (CFO), played a significant role in this initiative.

data.title: The Honor Foundation Announces New Chief Executive Officer, Kelly McGraw
data.description: The leadership of a national non-profit organization serving military communities is set to undergo a change as it looks to enhance its impact through the expansion of programs. The Honor Foundation, operating for more than ten years, will be implementing this transition in San Diego on April 28, 2026. This organization has been dedicated to providing elite military transition assistance and aims to further its reach in order to benefit a larger number of individuals within these communities.

data.title: Isos Technology Announces Leadership Transition to Support Next Phase of Growth and Innovation
data.description: In a press release on April 28, 2026, Isos Technology, a prominent Atlassian consulting and solutions partner supported by The Acacia Group, revealed changes in its leadership structure. Ron Thompson Jr has been named as the new President of the company, taking over from Founder Thad West, who will now serve as the Executive Chairman. This shift in positions marks a strategic move for the company as it progresses towards continued success.

data.title: Angle Advisors announces Shift Transit has been recapitalized by Main Street Capital Corporation
data.description: Birmingham, MI, 28th April 2026 - Angle Advisors disclosed the successful recapitalization of Shift Transit, LLC and Shift Transit Inc., premier micromobility operators offering maintenance and logistics services for docked bikeshare and scooter share systems throughout North America. Main Street Capital Corporation (NYSE: MAIN) led the recapitalization, collaborating with Shift Transit's founders and current owners. Main Street Capital's investment amounted to $40.0 million, including senior secured term debt and a minority equity investment.
